command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai

JOB_ID='phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2'
RUN_ID='bg-20260623T210555Z-6099f8d1'
WS="memory/execution-pipeline/governed/$JOB_ID/_background/$RUN_ID"

echo '===H: CANONICAL JOB PAC STATUS==='
cat memory/phase-controller/jobs/$JOB_ID/status.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
for k in ('status','current_step','error','retry_count','phase_id'):
    print(f'{k}: {d.get(k)}')
"

echo '===I: CONTROLLER STATE==='
cat memory/phase-controller/controller.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
for k in ('status','current_job_id','enabled'):
    print(f'{k}: {d.get(k)}')
"

echo '===J: RECOVERY RUN STATE==='
cat "$WS/run-state.json" 2>/dev/null

echo '===K: DIRECT RUN WORKSPACE CHECK==='
echo 'bg workspace exists:' $([ -d "$WS" ] && echo YES || echo NO)
echo 'run-state.json exists:' $([ -f "$WS/run-state.json" ] && echo YES || echo NO)
echo 'liveness hb exists:' $([ -f "$WS/heartbeat-liveness.json" ] && echo YES || echo NO)
echo 'progress hb exists:' $([ -f "$WS/heartbeat-progress.json" ] && echo YES || echo NO)
echo 'ledger exists:' $([ -f "$WS/event-ledger.ndjson" ] && echo YES || echo NO)
echo 'worker.log exists:' $([ -f "$WS/worker.log" ] && echo YES || echo NO)

echo '===L: LATEST HEARTBEATS==='
echo '-- liveness --'
cat "$WS/heartbeat-liveness.json" 2>/dev/null
echo '-- progress --'
cat "$WS/heartbeat-progress.json" 2>/dev/null

echo '===M: PID IDENTITY==='
PID=73909
kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null && echo "PID_EXISTS" || echo "PID_DEAD"
cat /proc/$PID/cmdline 2>/dev/null | tr '\0' ' ' || echo 'cmdline unavailable'
cat /proc/$PID/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^(Name|State|Pid):' || echo 'proc status unavailable'

echo '===N: LEDGER TAIL==='
tail -5 "$WS/event-ledger.ndjson" 2>/dev/null

echo '===O: ARTIFACT LIST==='
cat "$WS/phase-result.json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys,json
try:
    d=json.load(sys.stdin)
    print('result ok:', d.get('ok'))
    print('summary:', str(d.get('summary',''))[:120])
    arts=d.get('artifacts',[])
    print('artifacts:', len(arts))
    for a in arts[:5]: print(' -', a.get('path','?'), a.get('type','?'))
except: print('no result yet')
"

echo '===P: JOB ARTIFACTS==='
cat memory/phase-controller/jobs/$JOB_ID/status.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
arts=d.get('artifacts',[])
print('artifacts in job:', len(arts))
for a in arts[:5]: print(' -', a)
"

echo '===Q: WORKER LOG TAIL==='
tail -20 "$WS/worker.log" 2>/dev/null || echo 'no worker log'

echo '===R: ALL BG RUNS FOR JOB==='
ls -la memory/execution-pipeline/governed/$JOB_ID/_background/ 2>/dev/null

ENDSSH
